languages.text: "О, какая до смешного неуклюжая попытка меня раскрыть. В иной раз это могло бы меня даже развлечь. Но сейчас придется оборвать наше знакомство. С должным трагизмом, разумеется".

traits.locale_text: "О, какая до смешного неуклюжая попытка меня раскрыть. В иной раз это могло бы меня даже развлечь. Но сейчас придется оборвать наше знакомство. С должным трагизмом, разумеется".

languages.text: "Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."
languages.original_text: "О, какая до смешного неуклюжая попытка меня раскрыть. В иной раз это могло бы меня даже развлечь. Но сейчас придется оборвать наше знакомство. С должным трагизмом, разумеется".

traits.locale_text: "Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."
"Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."
"Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."

languages.text: “哦，想揭发我？这手段未免也太可笑了。换作平时，我说不定还会觉得有点意思。可惜啊，我们的交情只能到此为止了。真是个不太体面的结局，你说是吧？”
languages.original_text: "Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."

traits.locale_text: “哦，想揭发我？这手段未免也太可笑了。换作平时，我说不定还会觉得有点意思。可惜啊，我们的交情只能到此为止了。真是个不太体面的结局，你说是吧？”

languages.text: « Voilà une façon bien maladroite d'essayer de me démasquer. Dans d'autres circonstances, j'aurais même pu trouver votre tentative amusante. Malheureusement, nous n'aurons pas le loisir de faire plus ample connaissance. Un dénouement tragique, vous en conviendrez. »
languages.original_text: "Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà une façon bien maladroite d'essayer de me démasquer. Dans d'autres circonstances, j'aurais même pu trouver votre tentative amusante. Malheureusement, nous n'aurons pas le loisir de faire plus ample connaissance. Un dénouement tragique, vous en conviendrez. »

languages.text: "Beni ifşa etmek için ne kadar da gülünç derecede beceriksiz bir girişim. Başka bir zaman olsaydı bunu eğlenceli bile bulabilirdim. Fakat ne yazık ki tanışıklığımız burada sona ermek zorunda. Olaylar trajik bir seyir almak durumunda kaldı."
languages.original_text: "Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."

traits.locale_text: "Beni ifşa etmek için ne kadar da gülünç derecede beceriksiz bir girişim. Başka bir zaman olsaydı bunu eğlenceli bile bulabilirdim. Fakat ne yazık ki tanışıklığımız burada sona ermek zorunda. Olaylar trajik bir seyir almak durumunda kaldı."

languages.text: «Oh, qué intento tan torpe de revelar mi identidad. En cualquier otro momento, hasta me habría resultado cómico. Tal y como están las cosas, nuestra relación tendrá que acabar aquí. Un giro trágico de los acontecimientos, como usted mism{mf|o|a} puede ver».
languages.original_text: "Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."

traits.locale_text: «Oh, qué intento tan torpe de revelar mi identidad. En cualquier otro momento, hasta me habría resultado cómico. Tal y como están las cosas, nuestra relación tendrá que acabar aquí. Un giro trágico de los acontecimientos, como usted mism{mf|o|a} puede ver».

languages.text: "Oh, was für ein lächerlich unbeholfener Versuch, mich bloßzustellen. Zu jeder anderen Zeit fände ich ihn vielleicht sogar amüsant. Wie es aussieht, endet unsere Bekanntschaft hier. Eine tragische Wendung, findet Ihr nicht?"
languages.original_text: "Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."

traits.locale_text: "Oh, was für ein lächerlich unbeholfener Versuch, mich bloßzustellen. Zu jeder anderen Zeit fände ich ihn vielleicht sogar amüsant. Wie es aussieht, endet unsere Bekanntschaft hier. Eine tragische Wendung, findet Ihr nicht?"

languages.text: 「ああ、私を暴露しようとする、滑稽で不器用な試みね。普段なら、笑えるところもあるわ。でも、今は、ここで縁を切るしかないわ。悲しい結末ね、あなたも同意してくれるでしょう。」
languages.original_text: "Oh, what a laughably clumsy attempt to expose me. At any other time, I might even find it amusing. As it is, our acquaintance will have to end here. A tragic turn of events, you will agree."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、私を暴露しようとする、滑稽で不器用な試みね。普段なら、笑えるところもあるわ。でも、今は、ここで縁を切るしかないわ。悲しい結末ね、あなたも同意してくれるでしょう。」
